description_long: This is a large, hard-shell suitcase with a deep blue exterior and black trim, designed for travel in urban environments. The body features horizontal ridges for structural reinforcement and a modern, geometric look. It is equipped with four multidirectional wheels at the base for easy maneuverability and a sturdy, retractable top handle for pulling. There is also a fixed side handle for lifting, and a visible latch or lock mechanism on the side. The suitcase appears to have a central zipper track running around its perimeter, likely for opening the main compartment. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for both short and long trips.
description: A large, blue hard-shell suitcase with black trim, four wheels, and both retractable and fixed handles. It features a central zipper and a modern, ridged design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black zipper track, a fixed side handle, and two wheels visible at the base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main blue ridged panel, four wheels at the corners, and the top retractable handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the zipper track, four wheel mounts, and no visible handles.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the blue ridged panel, the top handle retracted into its slot, and four wheels at the base.
attribute_handle_type: Retractable telescopic top handle and fixed side handle
attribute_zipper_configuration: Single zipper track running around the perimeter for the main compartment, double zipper pulls visible
